# Reference Document Links

## API Version Evolution

- **Preview version overview**: Overview of how preview API versions work in TypeSpec Azure.
  <https://azure.github.io/typespec-azure/docs/howtos/versioning/01-preview-version>

- **preview → preview**: How to add a new preview version after an existing preview version.
  <https://azure.github.io/typespec-azure/docs/howtos/versioning/arm/02-preview-after-preview/>

- **preview → stable**: How to promote a preview version to stable.
  <https://azure.github.io/typespec-azure/docs/howtos/versioning/arm/03-stable-after-preview/>

- **stable → preview**: How to add a new preview version after a stable version.
  <https://azure.github.io/typespec-azure/docs/howtos/versioning/arm/04-preview-after-stable/>

- **stable → stable**: How to add a new stable version after an existing stable version.
  <https://azure.github.io/typespec-azure/docs/howtos/versioning/arm/05-stable-after-stable/>
